title: Linked-code reconciliation unchanged after skip-list cleanup
summary: Bug fix update: linked code memory reconciliation remains source fingerprint based after public source hygiene cleanup. The kernel change removed external tool specific workspace skip entries only; source hash staleness
body:
Bug fix update: linked-code memory reconciliation remains source-fingerprint based after public-source hygiene cleanup. The kernel change removed external-tool-specific workspace skip entries only; source_hash_staleness behavior is unchanged. Newly captured and diff-derived packets still store source fingerprints, linked source hash drift is reported through context, reconcile, hooks, and pr check, and agents must update or supersede affected packets before handoff.
Evidence: mcp/kernel.ts changed the workspace skip list only; stale-memory reconciliation tests still pass.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp
